ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient, a measure of income inequality */,
  "human_development_index" REAL /* Human Development Index (HDI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the World Bank region */,
  "population" REAL /* Total population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "bottom_decile_income" REAL /* Daily income/consumption of the bottom decile */,
  "top_bottom_difference" REAL /* Difference in daily income/consumption between top and bottom deciles */,
  "population" REAL /* Total population of the country */,
  "top_decile_income" REAL /* Daily income/consumption of the top decile */,
  "middle_class_size" REAL /* Percentage of the population considered middle class */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "population" REAL /* Total population of the country */,
  "fertility_rate" REAL /* Fertility rate (births per woman) */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth (years) */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in rural areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income distribution entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "decile_1" REAL /* Percentage of total income held by the first decile */,
  "decile_2" REAL /* Percentage of total income held by the second decile */,
  "decile_3" REAL /* Percentage of total income held by the third decile */,
  "decile_4" REAL /* Percentage of total income held by the fourth decile */,
  "decile_5" REAL /* Percentage of total income held by the fifth decile */,
  "decile_6" REAL /* Percentage of total income held by the sixth decile */,
  "decile_7" REAL /* Percentage of total income held by the seventh decile */,
  "decile_8" REAL /* Percentage of total income held by the eighth decile */,
  "decile_9" REAL /* Percentage of total income held by the ninth decile */,
  "decile_10" REAL /* Percentage of total income held by the tenth decile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_distribution_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumption_patterns" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption pattern entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "food" REAL /* Percentage of total consumption spent on food */,
  "housing" REAL /* Percentage of total consumption spent on housing */,
  "education" REAL /* Percentage of total consumption spent on education */,
  "healthcare" REAL /* Percentage of total consumption spent on healthcare */,
  "transport" REAL /* Percentage of total consumption spent on transport */,
  "entertainment" REAL /* Percentage of total consumption spent on entertainment */,
  "other" REAL /* Percentage of total consumption spent on other items */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_patterns_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate (percentage) */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate (percentage) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate (percentage) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate (local currency per USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Name of the table accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who contributed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "contribution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the contribution */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government, research institution) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_contributions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., economic, demographic) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data and analysis included in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Configuration data and settings for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
